summary: Full Playwright validation of the new offline-first feature on /students. All 9 in-scope behaviors verified against the live preview URL with page.context.set_offline toggling. AUTH RESILIENCE: hard-reload at /students while offline keeps user on /students (NOT redirected to /login) — AuthContext.useEffect catch branch correctly distinguishes 401/403 (clear token) from network failure (synthesise offline user). OFFLINE BANNER: data-testid='offline-banner-offline' renders with the rose palette and Arabic copy. OFFLINE GET CACHE: previously-fetched /students list rendered from idb-keyval after offline reload (1 cached card). OFFLINE CREATE: 'إضافة طالب' → student-form-name='طالب أوفلاين' → create-student-submit produces a card with data-testid='sync-badge-<id>' bearing the text 'محلي'. QUEUE PERSISTENCE: after a second offline reload, the badge still renders and indexedDB('mosaytra-offline') 'queue' key has 1 entry. ONLINE DRAIN: setting network online + dispatching window 'online' drains the queue within ~5s — badges disappear AND GET /api/students on the server now contains 'طالب أوفلاين TEST'. ONLINE CRUD REGRESSION: a fresh online create produces a card WITHOUT the 'محلي' badge. LOGIN REGRESSION: fresh teacher login (nivin/123456) routes to '/', fresh admin (bsn.1988/12abAB!?) routes to '/admin'. NO REGRESSIONS: /subjects loads, /settings loads, /admin loads. All TEST_ + 'أوفلاين' students cleaned up via DELETE /api/students/{id} (server returned empty list at end).
critical_code_review_comments: offlineApi.offlineMutate correctly distinguishes ERR_NETWORK / missing response from real 4xx-5xx — only the former is queued. The optimistic cache patch for /students POST sets _local=true and a local 'local_<uid>' id so the card immediately renders the 'محلي' badge.

offlineApi.drainQueue is idempotent (uses _draining flag), wired to both window 'online' and 'focus' events (iOS-friendly per spec), pops on success and drops on permanent 4xx so a single bad mutation can't block forever — good resilience.

AuthContext.useEffect: on /auth/me network failure it now synthesises a minimal user {id:'offline', role:'teacher', _offline:true} INSTEAD of clearing the token. This is the linchpin of the offline-resilience promise and works as designed (verified in browser).
OfflineBanner priority order (offline > syncing > error > synced) matches the PRD; 'synced' auto-clears after 2.5s via setTimeout in useOnlineStatus.

Minor: offlineApi.applyOptimisticCache does NOT update attendance caches on offline PATCH (intentional per file comment — server is source of truth for attendance and the queued mutation will replay). Worth documenting if attendance offline-edits ever need optimistic UI.

Minor: when the synthetic-offline user comes online, AuthContext does NOT auto-refetch /auth/me — the real user object only returns on next page navigation. UX is fine because the banner still updates and data flows, but the avatar/name in topbar will stay 'وضع غير متصل' until reload. Low priority polish.
test_credentials: Teacher: nivin / 123456 (confirmed). Admin: bsn.1988 / 12abAB!? (confirmed routes to /admin).
seed_data_creation: Test created 1 baseline student (TEST_BASELINE), 1 offline student ('طالب أوفلاين TEST'), 1 online-regression student (TEST_ONLINE_REG). ALL cleaned up via DELETE /api/students/{id} — final GET /api/students returned [] confirming zero leftovers.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Offline feature verified end-to-end. Key test IDs that are present and working: offline-banner-offline, sync-badge-<id> (text='محلي'), open-create-student, student-form-name, create-student-submit. IndexedDB DB name is 'mosaytra-offline', store 'kv', queue key 'queue'. To reproduce offline state in Playwright use page.context.set_offline(True) AND manually dispatch 'offline'/'online' window events (set_offline alone doesn't always trigger the event). Note that after offline /auth/me failure the topbar avatar shows 'وضع غير متصل' synthetic user until next page reload — that's by design and not a bug.
rca of the issue: N/A — no bugs found. All 9 spec items pass and no regression detected in login/admin/settings/subjects routes.
